title: Look To The Morning Light

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: In the dawn of endless grace
Where wisdom lifts her radiant face
The faithful dance with hearts aflame
While foolish hearts deny Your name

sections.label: Chorus
lines: From heaven's throne You gaze below
Upon the children that You know
Seeking those who understand
The mighty wonders of Your hand

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Though some may wander far astray
In shadows of their chosen way
Your light breaks through the darkest night
To guide Your people toward the light

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Oh, what joy when love appears
Breaking chains of ancient fears
When salvation sweeps the land
Like rivers through the desert sand

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Let Zion ring with songs of praise
As hope transforms our numbered days
For You restore Your people's soul
And make the broken spirit whole

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: From heaven's heights to earth below
Let all Your children come to know
The dance of grace, the song of peace
Where joy and wisdom never cease

epigraph: Who coverest thyself with light as with a garment
